title: Yukiyi 12 Pcs Brown Kraft Paper Christmas Wine Bottle Gift Bags, Fits 750ml Bottles, 4 Christmas Patterns, Santa Claus, Snowman, Wreath, Bells Wrapping, Party Favors
features: 12 Pcs Kraft Wine Bottle Gift Bags Set: 4 Christmas-themed wine bottle bags featuring Santa Claus and other festive designs. They can also serve as retail or merchandise bags.

Wine Gift Bags Detail: Each Xmas Drink Pouch measures 12.5 x 8 x 36.5 cm (4.9 x 3.1 x 14.4 inches), suitable for standard-sized bottles. Perfect for Christmas decorations, table settings, holiday gifts, parties, and themed events.
Xmas Pattern Design: These wine gift bags showcase a Christmas theme with designs like Santa Claus, Snowman, and Gift Box, making them perfect for any wine-giving occasion during the holiday season.
Ideal Christmas Gift: Use these Xmas covers to transform your wine bottles into thoughtful gifts for family, friends, neighbors, or employees.
Premium Material: Made from recycled kraft paper, these eco-friendly wine bottle cover bags are durable enough to securely hold your precious wines.
